overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious futuristic penthouse apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring Asian-inspired decor with golden lion statues and bamboo gardens, transitioning to a balcony overlooking the neon-lit Night City skyline, then returning through office and meditation spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment entry hallway with Asian decor

events.description: camera moves forward past the golden lion statue pedestal
entering darker room illuminated by a single floor lamp

agents.ego_description: walking through a luxurious hallway featuring a prominent golden lion statue on a carved wooden pedestal and bamboo plants in illuminated glass cases

entered.detail: large golden guardian lion statue with detailed mane and paws
tall bamboo stalks in a modern glass and metal planter with blue accent lighting
black and gold geometric patterned carpet runner along the hallway
dark wood pedestal with carved wave patterns supporting the lion statue

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit luxury apartment hallway with a prominent golden lion statue on a carved wooden pedestal to the right. The camera moves forward past geometric patterned carpet and illuminated bamboo installations, transitioning into a darker room with a floor lamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony transition with city view reveal

events.description: exiting through large glass sliding doors onto the outdoor balcony
city lights and neon signs become visible as camera steps onto balcony

agents.ego_description: moving from the interior through glass sliding doors onto an outdoor balcony with panoramic views of the futuristic cityscape

entered.detail: large frameless glass sliding door with metal rails leading to the terrace
dense futuristic cityscape with numerous illuminated skyscrapers and neon advertisements
tall skyscraper with prominent vertical neon signage displaying 05
polished wooden decking of the balcony floor

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the hallway through glass sliding doors onto a balcony, revealing a stunning nighttime view of a futuristic metropolis. The wooden deck extends outward as the skyline dominated by a neon-lit tower marked 05 comes into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with infinity pool overlooking metropolis

events.description: camera pans right to reveal more of the cityscape and rooftop amenities
view shifts to show illuminated rooftop pool and garden area with palm trees

agents.ego_description: panning across the balcony to take in panoramic views of the neon-lit Night City skyline and rooftop pool area

entered.detail: skyscraper with large colorful vertical display showing 07
rectangular illuminated pool with blue lighting on lower terrace level
palm trees with red uplighting along the terrace edge
transparent glass safety railing along the balcony perimeter

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the expansive balcony showcasing the glittering Night City skyline. A second neon tower marked 07 rises on the right, while below, an illuminated rooftop pool surrounded by palm trees with red accent lighting creates a luxurious atmosphere.

events.description: re-entering the apartment from the balcony through sliding glass doors
turning left through hallway featuring indoor bamboo garden installation

agents.ego_description: returning indoors through a modern office area with holographic displays, then proceeding through a hallway with bamboo installations and abstract art

entered.detail: glowing holographic projection of a classical bust hovering above a desk
modern dark wood desk with chair and holographic interface elements
tall bamboo stalks in illuminated glass enclosure with blue accent lighting
abstract artwork with red and green tones on dark walls

segments.scene_description: The camera moves back inside from the balcony into a sophisticated home office featuring a holographic display. Continuing through the apartment, the scene transitions into a hallway with wooden flooring, modern storage benches, and another bamboo garden installation.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacious meditation or exercise room with dramatic lighting

events.description: entering large open room with central exercise mat and weight equipment
approaching doorway with intense red neon lighting creating dramatic contrast

agents.ego_description: walking through a large open room featuring a central mat, exercise equipment, and dramatic oval wall sconces toward a red-lit exit

entered.detail: large rectangular mat with blue border on the wooden floor
oval-shaped illuminated wall fixtures with warm white light
doorway frame with intense red neon lighting leading to exterior
stacked cushions and weight plates arranged neatly

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a spacious open room designed for exercise or meditation, featuring a large central mat, modern wall sconces, and exercise equipment. The camera moves toward a dramatically lit doorway with intense red neon lighting, suggesting an exit to another area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit interiors of a luxury penthouse out toward a sprawling neon metropolis before returning to the apartment's serene private quarters. It begins in a shadowed hallway past a golden lion statue and illuminated bamboo installations, moving through a dark room before gliding through glass sliding doors onto an expansive wooden balcony. As the camera pans across the glittering Night City skyline, the view expands to reveal towering neon structures and a rooftop pool accented with red lighting and palm trees. The scene then shifts back inside, passing through a sophisticated home office with a holographic display and a wooden corridor lined with bamboo gardens. Finally, the camera enters a spacious meditation room with a central mat and exercise equipment before moving toward a doorway bathed in intense red neon light.
